## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, …) — the commitlint hook enforces this
- [ ] `npm test` passes for the workspace(s) you touched
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data added to the tree or history
- [ ] Docs/changelog updated if behavior changed
